title: BODMAS Bistro
short_description: Cook Chef Grinjamin's recipe-expressions in the order maths demands — stir the addition in too early and the dish explodes.
description: Chef Grinjamin's recipes are maths expressions like 3 + 4 × 2, and maths has RULES about what cooks first: Brackets, then × and ÷, then + and −. Tap the operation that must happen first, step by step, until the dish is done — stir the addition in too early and the dish literally explodes, leaving the chef's hat smoking and soup on the ceiling. Grade 4 covers × and ÷ before + and −; Grade 5 adds brackets to the menu. A free online order-of-operations (BODMAS/PEMDAS) game for kids in grades 4–5, with per-step points, serving bonuses and streaks feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the operation in the expression that must be calculated first.
